entity.summary: Asset Chain concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange based on a Uniswap v3 design, with current liquidity, fees, and recent spot-trading activity.
entity.notes: The first-party application remains reachable. Current protocol data reports continuing Asset Chain TVL, fees, and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume. HEI therefore classifies Asset Chain Swap as active.

evidence.title: Asset Chain Swap official application
evidence.notes: The current first-party application remains reachable and preserves the Asset Chain Swap identity.

evidence.title: Asset Chain Swap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Asset Chain Swap as a Uniswap v3-style CLMM on Asset Chain.

evidence.title: Asset Chain Swap protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Current TVL, fees, and non-zero recent DEX-volume windows support an active classification.
